# Architecture Documentation

This directory contains high-level diagrams, conceptual models, and architecture decision records for the UIAO framework.

## Naming Convention

- `Article XX - <Title>.md`
- `Diagram - <Name>.md` (with embedded image descriptions)

## Rules

- All content must be human-readable Markdown.
- No JSON, YAML, or machine-parseable artifacts belong here.
- Reference machine artifacts via links to `/machine/` rather than duplicating content.
